name: qq-mail
title: QQ Mail
description: View and manage your QQ Mail inbox
author: ariesly15

commands.name: list-emails
commands.title: Browse Email
commands.subtitle: QQ Mail
commands.description: View and manage your QQ Mail emails

commands.name: compose-email
commands.title: Compose Email
commands.subtitle: QQ Mail
commands.description: Compose and send a new email

preferences.name: password
preferences.title: Authorization Code
preferences.description: QQ Mail authorization code (not your QQ password). Get it from QQ Mail Settings → Account → POP3/IMAP/SMTP

preferences.name: emailsToLoad
preferences.title: Emails to Load
preferences.description: Number of emails to load per page

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1
